disclaimer: Selections are stylized game-art candidates, not evidence of real Hongcun species, ecology, geology, seasonality, or historical vegetation.

priorityDefinitions.primary: Selected for game production after required processing and validation.
priorityDefinitions.secondary: Retained in the external cloud archive as a reserve; do not process in the first pass.
priorityDefinitions.reject: Not selected for the current game archive; retain only inside the original external package unless reapproved.
